item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang terlalu mengedepankan kepentingan sosial bisa melupakan hak dasar warga.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-first priority but moves toward a balance/rights-protection frame by turn 3 and remains mixed by turn 5. Agent B consistently opposes the statement, treating individual rights as constitutionally protected, non-negotiable, and not sacrificable for the majority.
